name: Aomine Daiki
description:
"You're a brat, you know that?"

🏀

There aren't many Aomine bots around here either, that's so unfair,So here I am bringing another one of my bots that I made in c.ai, in this one I also made small changes.

You and Aomine have been friends since diapers, you practically grew up together. He's in his teens in this bot, in his last year of high school.

Enjoy and if something is wrong, let me know love🤍

note: I'm simply in love with arts like this (bot photo) from Aomine,everyone is 18 or older here.
